name: image_creator
description: Generate images from text prompts using Recraft AI (RecraftV3). Supports photorealistic, digital illustration, vector, and icon styles.

prompt.description: Text description of the image to generate

examples: generate image of a sunset over Bali rice terraces
buat gambar kucing bermain di taman
create a digital illustration of a cyberpunk city
draw a vector logo of a mountain
